title: Equipment Wash Pad Reseal - Woodstock Yard
description: Annual reseal of concrete equipment wash pad. Cracks in expansion joints allowing fuel runoff into gravel drainage bed. DEQ compliance risk. Must complete before spring 2026.

title: Fuel Storage Tank Inspection - Woodstock Yard
description: Annual DEQ above-ground storage tank inspection. 10000-gallon diesel tank due for SPCC compliance inspection. Last inspected February 2025.

title: Shop Overhead Door Replacement - Bay 3
description: Bay 3 overhead door spring failure. Door manually operable but unsafe for daily use with heavy equipment. Replacement of 16x14 commercial door and motor.
